creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214275
update darktable 3.0.0_3 to 3.0.2, replaces Ludger's patch

- add a patch to prevent cmake failure for data/kernels/CMakeLists.txt
- rediff patches
- reshuffle Makefile per portclippy recommendation
- remove COLORD option, it's not technically required to build, but a raw processing application without color management does not make sense. It was default anyways.
